children.heading: Funds available under unaffected by other provisionssection 2151a of this title
children.label: a Funds available under unaffected by other provisionssection 2151a of this title
children.text: The President is authorized to use any of the funds hereafter made available under to carry out the purposes of this subpart. Funds made available for such purposes may be used without regard to the provisions of sections 2151h(b) and 2151t(d) of this title.section 2151a of this title

children.heading: Foreign currencies
children.label: b Foreign currencies
children.text: Foreign currencies owned by the United States and determined by the Secretary of the Treasury to be excess to the needs of the United States shall be used to the maximum extent possible in lieu of dollars in carrying out the provisions of this subpart.

children.heading: Other authorizations
children.label: c Other authorizations
children.text: Assistance authorized under this subpart shall be in addition to any allotments or grants that may be made under other authorizations.

children.heading: Disclosure of funds to Administrator; annual report
children.label: d Disclosure of funds to Administrator; annual report
children.text: Universities may accept and expend funds from other sources, public and private, in order to carry out the purposes of this subpart. All such funds, both prospective and inhand, shall be periodically disclosed to the Administrator as he shall by regulation require, but no less often than in an annual report.
